## Checklist

- [ ] No customer names, project names, or proprietary logic
- [ ] No credentials, API keys, or connection strings
- [ ] JavaScript uses ES5 only (no `let`/`const`/arrow functions)
- [ ] CSS follows BEM kebab-case with a short prefix
- [ ] Tested with 2+ instances on the same page (if UC)
- [ ] README added or updated in the example folder (if UC)
- [ ] Skill frontmatter is valid YAML (if skill)
